news-korea-econ.title: Rubio designates Afghanistan as 'state sponsor of wrongful detention': 'Despicable tactics'
news-korea-econ.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio designated Afghanistan as a state sponsor of wrongful detention, accusing the Taliban of using terrorist tactics against Americans.

news-global-econ.title: Haleon to invest $87 million in Shanghai oral health plant, bets on China and India growth
news-global-econ.description: Haleon, which was spun off from GSK and Pfizer in 2022, sells well-known brands such as Sensodyne toothpaste and Advil painkillers, which the company said remain resilient despite inflationary pressures.

news-global-econ.title: Speaker Mike Johnson Sketches 'Course Correction' in DHS Deportation Policy
news-global-econ.description:
Federal deportation policy is undergoing a "course correction" amid pushback from swing-voting Latinos, according to House Speaker Mike Johnson.
The post Speaker Mike Johnson Sketches ‘Course Correction’ in DHS Deportation Policy appeared first on Breitbart.

news-global-econ.description:
The emerging AI industry has generated many questions on the impacts on Americans’ way of life, but Telnyx CEO David Casem believes the technology will revolutionize businesses and help empower American workers.

news-global-econ.title: Sen. Hyde-Smith set for November clash with Dem foe she once vanquished
news-global-econ.description: Sen. Cindy Hyde-Smith wins GOP primary to defend her Mississippi Senate seat against Democratic challenger District Attorney Scott Colom in November's general election.

news-global-soc.title: Asia’s fuel crunch triggers four-day weeks, school closures
news-global-soc.description: Asia faces fuel shortages, prompting governments to implement four-day work weeks and energy-saving measures amid Middle East supply disruptions.

news-global-soc.title: King Charles, Kate Middleton, Prince William heckled by protesters demanding answers on Andrew’s Epstein ties
news-global-soc.description: The royal family faced protesters in London on Monday who demanded answers about former Prince Andrew's Epstein connections following his arrest.

news-global-soc.title: US strike on key Iran oil hub would fit Trump's 'energy dominance doctrine,' expert says
news-global-soc.description: Reports indicate President Donald Trump's administration is considering a direct attack on Iran's Kharg Island, which handles 90% of Iranian oil exports near the Strait of Hormuz.
